author: Stefan Burke
content: Ashley fitted 11 solar panels and a 6kWh battery to our house in Prestwich, along with lots of smaller jobs like a "Positive Input Ventilation" system, outdoor lighting, extraction fans, and loads more. Every job was completed with total professionalism and fair prices with the area left clean and tidy. I recommend Ashley any time someone asks for an electrician, and especially if they're interested in generating solar power at home! In summer we now generate more electricity than we can use, and so we sell the excess back to our supplier which offsets our gas bills - very cool.
